objects.label: towel
objects.long_form_open_description: Partial off-white (cream) hand towel with a faded central printed motif in bluish and brown tones; soft woven fabric texture is visible though the image is slightly blurred and the towel is edge-cropped and appears draped or hanging. Appears close to the camera (approximately 0.6 m).
